- name: Create Resource Group for Azure Resources    # (a)  - Begin comments here

  gather_facts: false             # (c) If you're only using a local module, we set this option here. When true the meta or data about modules/tasks is collected and made available for use by other tasks     - name : Create Storage Account    Azure CLI command to create azure resources
